Class EfsDurationEndpoint

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsIntervalEndpoint
org.efs.feed.EfsDurationEndpoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<EfsDurationEndpoint>
public final class EfsDurationEndpoint extends EfsIntervalEndpoint implements Comparable<EfsDurationEndpoint>
An interval endpoint based on event time offset. This offset is applied when EfsFeed processes the associated subscription.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if o is an EfsDurationEndpoint instance with the same duration, clusivity, and interval location as this EfsDurationEndpoint instance.

    • timeOffset

      public Duration timeOffset()
      Returns time offset.
      Returns:
      time offset.

    • builder

      public static EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder builder()
      Returns a new EfsDurationEndpoint builder instance used to create an EfsDurationEndpoint object. It is recommended that a new builder be used for each new EfsDurationEndpoint instance and not re-use the same Builder instance to create multiple intervals.
      Returns:
      interval builder instance.
